title: Crispy Sour Rajasthani Cheddar Bake
description: A tangy, crunchy bake that fuses Rajasthani spices with creamy cheddar, perfect for a lazy Sunday lunch or snack.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F) and lightly grease a 9×9 inch baking dish.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk the yogurt with turmeric, cumin seeds, coriander powder, garam masala, and salt until smooth.
3. Add the shredded cheddar and lemon juice to the yogurt mixture, stirring until the cheese is well coated.
4. Fold in the whole wheat breadcrumbs, reserving a small amount for topping, and mix until the batter is sticky.
5. Transfer the mixture to the prepared dish, spreading evenly. Sprinkle the reserved breadcrumbs on top for a crisp finish.
6. Bake for 20–25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the edges are bubbling.
7. Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
8. Garnish with fresh chopped coriander and serve warm as a satisfying snack or light dinner.
